variations.compliment: Tom Peterson Inc Realtors looks like a great firm - it's impressive that Tom Peterson III helped bring the whole concept of a realtor to rural South Georgia back in 1979, when folks here just stuck a sign in the yard and called a lawyer!
variations.email:
Hello Carolyn,

Thanks for checking out Polymer! Tom Peterson Inc Realtors looks like a great firm - it's impressive that Tom Peterson III helped bring the whole concept of a realtor to rural South Georgia back in 1979, when folks here just stuck a sign in the yard and called a lawyer!

Happy to answer any questions you might have about Polymer.

Cheers,
Jessica
